mnemonics: METER measures energy to manage it efficiently: Monitor, Evaluate, Track, Execute, Reduce.
keyPoints: Provides real-time data on energy consumption for IT infrastructure.
Enables data-driven decisions to optimize energy usage and reduce waste.
Forms the foundational step for implementing broader Green IT initiatives like load shifting and carbon reporting.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with simple billing meters; its primary purpose is for active management and optimization, not just cost tracking.
Assuming installation is the end goal; the real value comes from analyzing the data and taking action on the insights.
